other_observers: seen with many other birders, on the five days I saw it.  Once in December and four times in January.  Most of the sightings are from this lake, I also saw it at another pond on the 1st date and the golf course, near by.
duration: several hours over the 5 days I saw it
description: A brown headed goose, with pink in the bill, and pink legs and feet.  See photos.  Seen with lots of other geese. First found on December 11, 2018 by Steve Mlodinow.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
